moqui.resource.wiki.WikiSpace.description: MCP Prompt Templates for AI assistants

entity-facade-xml.moqui.resource.DbResourceFile: This server provides access to Moqui ERP through MCP.

[ { "name": "focus", "title": "Focus Area", "description": "Area of operations to focus on", "type": "string", "enum": ["general", "catalog", "orders", "customers"], "required": false }, { "name": "detailLevel", "title": "Detail Level", "description": "Level of instruction detail", "type": "string", "enum": ["basic", "advanced"], "required": false } ]
